title: Marketplaces Overview tab is visible for BP-enabled users
objective: Validate that users with Brand Protection entitlement can discover the new Marketplaces Overview entry point under Brand Protector > Benefits and start the feature flow from primary navigation.
preconditions:
1. User is authenticated and has access to Brand Protector > Benefits based on entitlement.
2. Marketplace Overview feature is deployed in release_8 environment.
3. Test account and marketplace data required for this scenario are available.
expected_result: Marketplaces Overview tab is visible for BP-enabled users
requirement_mapping: BP-MO-001-US001 - Marketplace Overview Tab in Benefits

title: Marketplace Overview opens with default all-brand, all-region, last-week Card view
objective: Verify the default state on first load after opening Marketplaces Overview tab so users immediately see the expected baseline context without manual filter setup.
preconditions:
1. User is authenticated and has access to Brand Protector > Benefits based on entitlement.
2. Marketplace Overview feature is deployed in release_8 environment.
3. Test account and marketplace data required for this scenario are available.
expected_result: Marketplace Overview opens with default all-brand, all-region, last-week Card view
requirement_mapping: BP-MO-001-US001 - Marketplace Overview Tab in Benefits

title: Marketplaces Overview tab is hidden for users without BP entitlement
objective: Ensure feature-gating is enforced so users without Brand Protection access cannot see or access the Marketplaces Overview tab through normal navigation.
preconditions:
1. User is authenticated and has access to Brand Protector > Benefits based on entitlement.
2. Marketplace Overview feature is deployed in release_8 environment.
3. Test account and marketplace data required for this scenario are available.
expected_result: Marketplaces Overview tab is hidden for users without BP entitlement
requirement_mapping: BP-MO-001-US001 - Marketplace Overview Tab in Benefits

title: Direct URL access to Marketplace Overview is blocked for non-BP users
objective: Validate unauthorized access handling when a non-entitled user attempts to open Marketplace Overview via deep link, preventing privilege bypass.
preconditions:
1. User is authenticated and has access to Brand Protector > Benefits based on entitlement.
2. Marketplace Overview feature is deployed in release_8 environment.
3. Test account and marketplace data required for this scenario are available.
expected_result: Direct URL access to Marketplace Overview is blocked for non-BP users
requirement_mapping: BP-MO-001-US001 - Marketplace Overview Tab in Benefits
